description: §57 wire absence envelope, PRESENT path. loadUser() returns User | not; the present response round-trips a User struct. @user hydrates to {id,name}; the derived userLabel (@user is some ? @user.name : "anonymous") reads the name, so #who reads "Current: Ada". Twin of optional-absent. OQ1 NOTE: a single #who anchor reading a derived cell sidesteps the if-guard display-toggle-vs-template asymmetry; impl-neutral.
rationale: §57 a `T | not` server return round-trips through the dual-decoder; the present (T) value is emitted through the normal serializer (no envelope) and decodes to the struct. §42.2.5 `is some` discriminates presence -> userLabel = the name.
